title: AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF CARIDAD ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE CITY OF CAVITE TO LAD1SLAO DIWA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 7567 / 60 OG No. 52, 8578 (December 28, 1964)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4005, June 18, 1964 ]

AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF CARIDAD ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE CITY OF CAVITE TO LAD1SLAO DIWA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Caridad Elementary School in the City of Cavite is hereby changed to Ladislao Diwa Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 18, 1964.
